name: obedience-benchmark
description: Marketplace for the Obedience Benchmark plugin ecosystem — benchmark task packs, judge extensions, and runner harnesses for testing AI agent process fidelity.

plugins.name: obedience-benchmark
plugins.description: Core benchmark plugin for measuring AI agent obedience to prescribed processes. 7 skills: catalog manager, task creator, task preparer, candidate runner, judge, report generator, and benchmarker orchestrator. Includes 10 seed benchmark tasks across 6 domains.
